slate: 2026 NHL salary arbitration — the 15 filings announced 2026-07-05; hearings 2026-07-20 to 2026-08-01. The universe was frozen at the announcement and is never substituted.
merkleRootNote: fetched at bake time from the public anchored repo (merkle-manifest.json)

rekor.note: fetched at bake time from the public repo's sigstore bundle

howToVerify: Fetch the public book at the anchored commit: git clone https://github.com/Jcurry44/icenomics-open-book — the frozen tickets, the Merkle manifest, and the anchor receipts live there, not on this site.

Recompute the root yourself: canonicalize any ticket (RFC 8785) and rebuild the tree with the repo's rig — node rig/merkle.mjs over the frozen tickets, or rig/verify.sh to replay one ticket's inclusion proof.
Compare the recomputed root to the root in the Sigstore Rekor transparency-log entry bound to the repo's CI workflow identity (merkle-manifest.json.sigstore.json).
Check the Rekor integratedTime predates the resolution you are scoring — only resolutions strictly after the anchor count as pre-registered; same-day ambiguity costs the house.
settlementRulesNote: Settlement rules are pre-registered and versioned in the public repo. Once a version is anchored it is immutable; changes ship as a new version with a diff note and never apply retroactively to tickets frozen under an earlier version.

tickets.event: 2026 NHLPA salary arbitration filing (announced 2026-07-05; hearings Jul 20 - Aug 1); hearing: 2026-08-01
tickets.claim: Predicted $1,481,818 AAV (0.01425 cap-share of the $104M 2026-27 cap; CI 0.00683–0.02167). Settles against the realized AAV of whatever resolves the filing — club deal, arbitration award, or walk. Term is not scored.
